prestazioni: Engine swap to a **LS7 (7.0L Gen IV small-block, 427ci)** with forged internals (Callies DragonSlayer crank, Manley H-beam rods, JE 12.5:1 pistons) and ported LS7 cylinder heads by **West Coast Racing Cylinder Heads**, paired with a **Holley Dominator EFI** standalone ECU and **FAST 102mm throttle body** for precise fuel and ignition mapping.

Forced induction via **Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA** turbocharger (800whp capable) with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV**, feeding through a **custom 4-inch stainless steel exhaust** with **Borla Pro XS mufflers** and **Hooker BlackHeart headers** for optimized scavenging.

Suspension overhaul with **RideTech HQ Series coilovers (C3-specific valving)** and **Global West tubular control arms (front/rear)**, paired with **Wilwood 6-piston front calipers** and **Baer 14-inch rotors** for track-ready braking, while retaining the **C3’s original 15x8/15x11 rally wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/60R15 front, 335/35R15 rear)** for period-correct grip.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny C3 widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front splitter, and ducktail spoiler) with **custom-mixed PPG Viper Red paint** and **bare carbon fiber hood** (replica of the **1970 LT-1 ZR1 hood**) for weight savings and aggression.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SRD bucket seats (1970s-spec)** upholstered in **Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts**, a **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm)**, and a **custom roll cage** integrated with **Sparco 6-point harnesses** for vintage racing compliance.

Lightweight **Hella 7-inch headlights (H4 conversion)** with **Cibie Oscar rally covers**, **LED taillights (replica of the 1969 Stingray units)**, and **custom side-exit exhaust tips (stainless steel, 4-inch diameter)** for a retro-modern aesthetic.
